3010970.name: Hotspot Earth
3010970.description:
Hotspot Earth is a round-based horde survival arena with light party-management and simulation elements.

Every round you visit a different country, facing different hazards that attack you and threaten local points of interests. Defend not just yourself but also these points or succumb to the increasing threat. Build your movement, shape society, and find a way for humanity to thrive.

Features

  • Round-based horde survival arena (30-40 minutes per full run)

  • Mini-Quests expanding arena game play and challenge

  • Endless builds with "game-breaking" potential 

  • Party management lets "upgrades" learn from each other

  • Society phase where your choices influence the late-game difficulty of the game - from challenging to nearly impossible

  • Colorful, cartoony art giving the climate crisis a cute and hopeful makeover

Developed with science

Hotspot Earth builds on real research to communicate it in an accessible way, collaborating with the International Institute for Applied Systems Analysis and the CHOICE research project.
